subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants at the Threshold of Divine Unity! When the Sun of Truth shone forth from the Dayspring of Oneness upon all horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق درگاه احدیت شمس حقیقت چون از صبح احدیت اشراق بر آفاق نمود
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
